meaning: n.<美军俚>平民男子,征兵不录(或缓役)的男子(亦作jodie)
examples: Come and work out with our qualified personal trainer, Jodie McGregor, on the grounds of the Middleton Lodge estate.
Jodie Foster played a young prostitute in the 1976 film "Taxi Driver".
Fancy Jodie Foster and Sigourney Weaver.
One of the opponents is Jodie Carver from Bob Carvers fish and chip restaurant.
Among them: Tom Hanks, Denzel Washington and Jodie Foster, each of whom scored two.
